meta.title: Turning the B-1 Bomber into a supersonic gunship?!
meta.description:
Boeing's plan to turn the B-1B Lancer into a supersonic gunship may have been just a bit too crazy to become real... but it sure could have been cool.

#b1b #b1bomber #boeing #airpower
